title: Self-compassion reset

steps.title: Hard part
steps.body: Name what feels hard without judging yourself for it.

steps.title: Common humanity
steps.body: Other people struggle too. What would you say to someone you cared about?

steps.title: Supportive action
steps.body: Choose one kind action that fits the moment.

completionPrompt: Kindness does not mean the situation is easy. It means you are not adding extra punishment.
